overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through a futuristic neon-lit urban environment. The player moves from a dark corridor into a stylish bar with blue geometric ceiling lights and red ambient lighting, then exits back to the corridor and approaches a large illuminated 'ADVOCET' sign in an open commercial underpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic pedestrian corridor with neon floor lighting

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a dark corridor following cyan floor lights toward a lit entrance

entered.detail: glowing cyan light strips embedded in the floor marking the path
dark concrete walls with industrial texture
rectangular ceiling light fixtures providing dim illumination
warm light emanating from the bar entrance at the end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view walking through a dark, narrow corridor with glowing cyan floor lights. The concrete walls and overhead fluorescent lights create an industrial atmosphere as the camera approaches a brightly lit bar entrance in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: upscale bar lounge with geometric ceiling installation

events.description: enters the brightly lit bar area from the dark corridor, revealing red ambient lighting and blue neon ceiling

agents.ego_description: walking into the bar lounge and moving between tables toward the center of the room

notable_agents.action: patrons standing and conversing near the bar tables

entered.detail: intricate geometric pattern of blue neon lights covering the ceiling
small red and pink glowing lights on each table creating ambient atmosphere
circular tables arranged throughout the lounge area
long bar counter with bottles and glasses visible
transparent glass railing overlooking lower level
upper level walkway with metal railings visible above

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a stylish bar lounge featuring a striking geometric blue neon ceiling installation and red ambient table lighting. NPC patrons stand scattered throughout the space near round tables, while a bar counter runs along the left side and a glass railing overlooks the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: bar interior approaching exit with view of ceiling installation

events.description: camera tilts upward to look directly at the geometric blue neon ceiling installation
camera tilts back down and turns toward the exit doorway

agents.ego_description: looking up at the ceiling installation then turning toward the exit while moving past the bar counter

notable_agents.action: patron in red clothing standing near the exit doorway

entered.detail: illuminated display of bottles on the wall behind the bar
doorway leading back to the dark corridor with cyan lighting visible beyond

segments.scene_description: Moving through the bar toward the exit, the camera tilts up to admire the intricate blue neon ceiling installation before tilting back down. The bar counter with wall-mounted bottles passes by on the left as the exit doorway becomes visible ahead.

events.description: exits the bar back into the dark corridor with cyan floor strip lights

agents.ego_description: leaving the bar and walking through the dark corridor toward the distant city lights

entered.detail: glowing cyan light strips marking the pedestrian path
dark industrial concrete walls of the covered walkway

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the bar back into the dark corridor with cyan floor lights. The industrial concrete walls and overhead fluorescent lights return as the camera walks toward distant city lights and storefront glows visible at the end of the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial underpass with large illuminated signage

events.description: approaches open commercial area with large illuminated ADVOCET sign becoming visible on the left
brighter neon lighting from storefronts and signage illuminates the scene

agents.ego_description: walking past the ADVOCET sign and continuing along the commercial underpass with storefronts on the left

entered.detail: large illuminated sign spelling 'ADVOCET' in bright white letters on building facade
lit shop windows and commercial displays along the left wall
metal escalator structure leading to upper levels
double yellow lines painted on the asphalt surface

segments.scene_description: The corridor opens into a wider commercial underpass where a large illuminated 'ADVOCET' sign dominates the left side. Storefront displays and escalators become visible as the camera continues walking past the sign, with yellow road markings now visible on the asphalt ground.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a dim industrial corridor through a vibrant neon lounge and back into a sprawling commercial underpass. It begins by moving through a dark, narrow hallway defined by concrete walls and glowing cyan floor lights, drawing closer to a brightly lit entrance. As the camera enters the bar, the environment shifts into a stylish lounge featuring a geometric blue neon ceiling and red ambient lighting, where the view tilts upward to admire the installation before passing by a bottle-lined counter toward the exit. The scene then transitions back into the industrial gloom of the corridor, with the cyan lights and fluorescent overheads returning as the camera advances toward distant city glows. Finally, the walkway opens into a wide commercial underpass, passing a large illuminated ADVOCET sign and storefront displays above asphalt ground marked with yellow road lines.
